title: 2013 Press Releases
summary: This source is a Federal Reserve website index page listing all press releases from calendar year 2013. It is not a single document but rather a navigation/listing page containing approximately 100+ individual press releases spanning diverse topics including FOMC statements, regulatory guidance, enforcement actions, banking applications, and other Fed announcements. The source is a historical record from over 12 years ago and does not represent archiveable content on its own.
key_points: This is a listing/index page, not a single source document - individual press releases would need to be archived separately
Contains links to multiple FOMC-related documents from 2013 including statements (Dec 18), minutes (Oct 29-30), and projections (Dec 17-18)
Includes regulatory announcements such as Volcker rule implementation (Dec 10, 2013)
Contains enforcement actions, banking applications, and other administrative Fed announcements
The page itself is not directly usable for research without selecting specific child documents
why_it_matters: This listing page serves as an index to 2013 Federal Reserve communications but cannot be used as a standalone research document. Individual press releases would need to be identified and archived separately for meaningful research use. The page demonstrates the breadth of Fed activity in 2013 but provides no specific data, decisions, or analysis on its own.

issues_found: Source is a listing_page (navigation/index page) - per rule 6, listing pages must be rejected
event_type is 'unknown' which is technically accurate but indicates no single event can be attributed to this source
Source is a container page with no standalone research value - individual press releases would need to be archived separately
Source contains no specific macro catalyst or market structure content of its own - just an index of links
Source is over 12 years old (2013 vs 2026-03-31) with no archival value as a collection index

notes: NON-ARCHIVABLE: This is a listing_page (navigation index) containing links to approximately 100+ individual press releases from 2013. Per core rule 6, listing pages should not be treated as archiveable content. The page contains no specific macro catalyst or market structure content of its own. Individual documents would need to be identified and archived separately. Source is extremely stale (12+ years old) and would have low research utility for current market structure or macro catalyst analysis. Recommend excluding from archive entirely.
